text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Image recognition allows computers to identify objects, people, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by not only recognizing what is in an image but also locating where each object is. This technology has many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other cars on the road. It also powers facial recognition on smartphones and assists doctors in analyzing medical images. As technology advances, computer vision will continue to transform how machines interact with our visual environment.
